notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Curtis Mead. Anthony Seigler scores.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Narváez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Narváez grounds into a double play, third baseman Curtis Mead to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr. Romy Gonzalez to 3rd. Caleb Durbin out at 2nd. Carlos Narváez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrés Chaparro GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Chaparro grounds into a double play, shortstop Tsung-Che Cheng to second baseman Anthony Seigler to first baseman Willson Contreras. James Wood out at 2nd. Andrés Chaparro out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. doubles (15) on a fly ball to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Nasim Nuñez scores. Keibert Ruiz scores.
